name: claude-ops
description: Claude Ops keeps your Claude Code configuration at the values it was meant to have — statusLine HUD, GrowthBook guard, analytics, anomaly detector, health auditor, daily advisor.

scripts.test:guard: node --test --test-reporter=spec src/cli/guard-status.test.js src/cli/guard-validate.test.js src/cli/guard-mode.test.js src/cli/guard-repair.test.js src/guard/guard-validation.test.js src/guard/vertex-config.test.js src/health/checks/guard-drift.test.js src/display/lines/guard.test.js src/collectors/guard-reader.test.js && cargo test --manifest-path src/guard/rust/Cargo.toml && bats src/guard/guard-bash.bats
scripts.smoke:install: tmp=$(mktemp -d) && CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR="$tmp/.claude" CLAUDE_OPS_SYSTEMD_USER_DIR="$tmp/systemd" CLAUDE_OPS_BIN_DIR="$tmp/bin" CLAUDE_OPS_SKIP_SYSTEMCTL=1 node src/cli/index.js repair --apply >/dev/null && CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR="$tmp/.claude" CLAUDE_OPS_SYSTEMD_USER_DIR="$tmp/systemd" CLAUDE_OPS_BIN_DIR="$tmp/bin" CLAUDE_OPS_SKIP_SYSTEMCTL=1 node src/cli/index.js guard repair --apply >/dev/null && CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR="$tmp/.claude" CLAUDE_OPS_SYSTEMD_USER_DIR="$tmp/systemd" CLAUDE_OPS_BIN_DIR="$tmp/bin" CLAUDE_OPS_SKIP_SYSTEMCTL=1 node src/cli/index.js doctor --json >/dev/null && CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR="$tmp/.claude" CLAUDE_OPS_SYSTEMD_USER_DIR="$tmp/systemd" CLAUDE_OPS_BIN_DIR="$tmp/bin" CLAUDE_OPS_SKIP_SYSTEMCTL=1 node src/cli/index.js guard validate --strict --json >/dev/null

author: AJ (AmeerJ97)
